description.ko: 수학적 완벽함과 디지털 혼돈이 만나는 고대비 탐구입니다. 날카로운 기하학적 프리즘이 깊고 어두운 공허를 배경으로 리드미컬한 글리치 아티팩트에 의해 산산조각 나며, KURO-X 특유의 미래지향적 미학을 구현합니다.
description.en: A high-contrast exploration of mathematical perfection meeting digital chaos. Sharp geometric prisms are shattered by rhythmic glitch artifacts against a deep, dark void, embodying the core KURO-X futuristic aesthetic.

prompt: KURO-X aesthetic, geometric glitch art, abstract sharp polygons, digital fragmentation, displacement mapping, chromatic aberration, obsidian black background, neon cyan and magenta highlights, pixel sorting, high-tech data corruption, futuristic structure, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed, sharp edges, synthwave brutalism
